nodes.context: Russian hacking group behind Dridex malware, active since 2009.
Hacking group whose core member Vyacheslav Penchukov was a friend of Evil Corp leader.
Ransomware group; a 2021 attack initially attributed to REvil may have been by Evil Corp.
Ransomware group that Evil Corp affiliated with and used to disguise identity.
Russian paramilitary group; an Evil Corp member participated in a hackathon organized by them.
Botnet or group listed as author of Dridex in infobox.

edges.context: Evil Corp leader Yakubets was a personal friend of Jabber Zeus core member Penchukov.
Evil Corp affiliated with LockBit, using its ransomware to disguise identity.
A 2021 ransomware attack initially attributed to REvil may have been by Evil Corp.
Evil Corp member Igor Turashev participated in a hackathon organized by Wagner Group.
Necurs is listed as an author of Dridex, which is operated by Evil Corp.
